title: 30 Complete Records Collection questions chat
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 Complete Records Collection questions/chat Post by s0ulger » Wed Apr 10, 2013 2:24 pm To start, I've already purchased the first two; although picking them up last year I paid through the nose. The reason I'm starting this thread up is because I want to be sure to grab this thing as soon as it comes out, but have never had to do so with anything of the like. I'm curious if anyone here has bought these direct after release, and I need to know if those of us in the U.S. can buy direct, or do we have to use a proxy to obtain them? That's something I'd like to talk about. I've never had to use a proxy to buy anything from Japan, so if anyone can give me any info on who's trusted/the best I'd be grateful. I'd also like to try and keep this thread alive with any and all info about the 3.0 CRC and its release.

[]: Post by pwhodges » Wed Apr 10, 2013 2:36 pm For buying on the Internet in Japan and shipping internationally, I've used this guy: [email protected] (SharpServiceJapan) Send him details of what you want, and from where, and he gets the price and sends you a quote, you pay him by PayPal, then he will buy it for you and forward the goods for a remarkably modest markup. I've used him to get rare classical CDs from Japan a couple of times from sites that either wouldn't ship internationally or which I couldn't navigate even with translation aids.

[]: Post by s0ulger » Wed Apr 10, 2013 4:08 pm Thanks pwhodges; I'll have to look into that. I'm really excited for this, even though I won't be able to look through it until after watching the movie. As a wannabe animator these books are just fantastic.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Apr 10, 2013 8:57 pm Amazon.co.jp will have it whenever it does come out and they do ship internationally unless it's video games. And when did you get the first two last year that you had to pay through your nose? Both were re-issued before Q's theatrical release. http://forum.evageeks.org/post/562965/Evangelion-20-Complete-Records-Collection/#562965

[]: Post by Blue Monday » Wed Apr 10, 2013 9:02 pm Fuck I wish I had the money for these. So badly WANT.

[]: Post by s0ulger » Thu Apr 11, 2013 12:56 pm I picked up the first two from the original release, back when they were even rarer i guess. So yeah I never knew they even re-released them because I bought them before then. Either way I got them, even though I know feel duped. Thanks again Japan and your 'it's rare', until we re-release it. TMBounty_Hunter are you certain about these books being sold outside of the exclusivity of The Eva Store? I bought the first two through gentlemen who bought them for resale through Amazon, and had to contact the sellers to see who was willing to ship to the U.S.. And if Amazon sells them, this will make the whole process that much easier.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:59 pm They were never exclusives anywhere. I got 1.0 from Hobby Link Japan and 2.0 from Amazon.co.jp.

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Apr 11, 2013 7:03 pm Blue Monday wrote: Fuck I wish I had the money for these. So badly WANT.

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 11, 2013 8:13 pm Wouldn't it make more sense... to have this thread when 3.0 CRC is actually announced? Yes. Yes, it would.
